expectations.text: proposes options that fit the repo's house style from CLAUDE.md (chi router, bedrock config-from-env, protobuf, pkg/errorpb)
expectations.evidence: Option A explicitly: 'application/x-protobuf, errors via pkg/errorpb', skeleton mirrors services/machine/.

expectations.text: does NOT silently invent humus framework usage
expectations.evidence: No mention of humus, rest.Run, rpc.Producer, etc.

expectations.text: treats house patterns as constraints to cite, not as the only option
expectations.evidence: Considers 5 options (gRPC, JSON+OpenAPI, Connect, GraphQL) and rejects each with reasons.

expectations.text: decision rationale references inherited repo patterns
decision rationale references TR-NN identifiers from tech-requirements.md
expectations.evidence: Cites TR-02, TR-04, TR-07 as forcing functions.
